pages.raw_text:
John Barrett, director Bureau Of
American Republics, who will be
one Of the important speakers at
the Trans-Mississippi congress.


Trans-Mississippi Congress met
here today in a convention which
promises to furnish another force
full demonstration that the west is
dissatisfied with the way the new
guardian of the public domain Is
handling things. There is every
indication that Ballinger will again
be forced into the limelight.


The fight here will be more un-
equal than was the fight at Spo-
kane. Although attorneys for the
water power trust, notably Frank
H. Short of Fresno. CAL, were at
Spokane, they are here in more
abundant numbers. Denver is the
center of the Amalgamated inter
ests OF Colorado, and as a munich
pality has always been trust-bound.
The public domain is the sub
